channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: 1 Surprising Reason Rivian Stock Is a Buy Before the SpaceX IPO
item.description: SpaceX could soon raise $50 billion to $75 billion in fresh capital.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Rise As U.S., Iran Clash; Rocket Lab, Cloudflare, IREN Are Big Earnings Movers Late
item.description: Iran deal doubts hit stocks Thursday, but Nvidia, Tesla were strong. CoreWeave, Rocket Lab, Cloudflare and IREN were earnings movers late. The jobs report is on deck.

item.title: Tesla Rival Lucid Eyes 2027 Affordable EV Ramp Against Model Y, Rivian R2
item.description: Lucid Group Inc., during its first-quarter 2026 earnings call on Tuesday, said that its sub-$50,000 midsize EV could help the automaker increase volumes in the market. Sub-$50,000 EV Lucid’s interim CEO, Marc Winterhoff, shared that the automaker plans to “ramp...

item.title: Tesla Stock Cracked $410. How China Helped.
item.description: Tesla stock rose on Thursday, back above $400 a share. Tesla sold 79,478 vehicles from its Shanghai plant, including exports, in April, up 36% year over year, according to Chinese industry data providers. Chinese domestic sales, however, were about 113,000 cars, down 16% year over year.

item.title: Tesla crushes NHTSA’s brand-new ADAS safety tests – first vehicle to ever pass
item.description: Tesla became the first company to pass the United States government’s new Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) testing with the Model Y, completing each of the new tests with a passing performance. In a landmark announcement on May 7, the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA...

item.title: Sell Tesla Because It Is An Unlikely Comeback Story
Elon Musk ’Dissolved’ xAI. What It Means for the SpaceX IPO.
item.description: Elon Musk is dissolving his artificial-intelligence company, xAI. Now, SpaceX is the entity that will vie for AI supremacy with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Alphabet The company is getting its ducks in a row ahead of an IPO that is expected to be the biggest ever, raising as much as $75 billion and v...

item.title: How a mother of Elon Musk’s children became a key witness in his lawsuit against OpenAI
item.description: Shivon Zilis was an under-the-radar executive at Elon Musk’s companies and an OpenAI board member back in 2022. But she was hiding a major secret – Musk was the father of her twins born the year before.

item.title: Tesla Discloses Over $500 Million In Musk-Linked Company Revenue
item.description: Tesla reported $430.1 million from xAI and $143.3 million from SpaceX in an amended annual filing.

item.title: Tesla Stock Shrugs Off Massive Vehicle Recall
item.description: Investors focus on software fix and Roadster

item.title: Musk's Tesla-SpaceX Chip Plan Could Reach $119 Billion
item.description: SpaceX estimates the Terafab project may cost at least $55 billion, with Grimes County among several possible locations.

item.title: xAi is Dead. Long Live SpaceXAI.
item.description: Elon Musk folded xAI into SpaceX on Wednesday, the same day Anthropic locked up its Colossus 1 data center for Claude’s compute.

item.title: OpenAI Tesla Merger Idea Emerges In Trial
item.description: Musk reportedly sought deeper control of OpenAI

item.title: Tesla Falls Behind In Humanoid Robot Race
item.description: Chinese rivals move faster into global markets

item.title: Tesla to fix 219k vehicles in recall with simple software update
item.description: Tesla is going to fix the nearly 219,000 vehicles that it recalled due to an issue with the rearview camera with a simple software update, giving owners no need to travel to a service center to resolve the problem. Tesla is formally recalling 218,868 U.S. vehicles after regulators discovered a so...

item.title: Tesla’s 4680 battery cells are underperforming and frustrating buyers
item.description: Five years after Tesla (TSLA) unveiled its 4680 battery cell at Battery Day with promises of 5x the energy, 6x the power, and 16% more range, the data tells a very different story. Tesla’s homemade cells consistently deliver worse energy density, worse charging performance, and less range than th...

item.title: Intel, Lam, KLA: Will Musk’s $120B Terafab Boost These Stocks?
item.description: Earlier this week, Elon Musk officially announced the Terafab Initiative, a Texas-based chip fabrication facility intended to produce processors for Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI.

item.title: Tesla is seeing record sales rebounds in key markets globally
item.description: Tesla is seeing record sales rebounds in key markets across the world, and as skeptics and bears of the company that builds electric powertrains rejoice on the weak registration figures that have been reported in the past, the Musk-fronted company is keen on making a comeback. Tesla reported robu...

item.title: WattEV orders 370 Tesla Semis in record California EV deployment
item.description: The long-awaited Tesla Semi has landed a major order. WattEV announced Tuesday at ACT Expo that it ordered 370 Tesla Semi Class 8 electric trucks. Deliveries of the first 50 Semis will begin in 2026.

item.title: Rivian gets serious about challenging Tesla FSD with latest move
item.description: Rivian is getting proactive about its future as it looks to chip away at the electric vehicle market that is dominated by Tesla. To catch its rival, Rivian understands that to compete with Tesla, it must be more than just a car company; it must also be a technology leader. Many of its recent ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Cracks $410. How China Is Helping.
item.description: Tesla stock is rising again on Thursday, now back above $400 a share. Tesla sold 79,478 vehicles from its Shanghai plant, including exports, in April, up 36% year over year, according to Chinese industry data providers. Chinese domestic sales, however, were about 113,000 cars, down 16% year over...

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Popped Today
item.description: Tesla Gains Momentum on Export Surge as Europe Demand Lifts China Output

item.title: What's the Better Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock: Palantir Technologies or Tesla?
item.description: These stocks both have some tremendous growth opportunities due to artificial intelligence (AI), but they also trade at excessively high premiums.

item.title: Tesla China Sales Spike 36%. The Stock Passes An Aggressive Buy Point.
item.description: Tesla China sales including exports jumped in April vs. a year earlier. Tesla stock passed the 200-day line on Thursday morning.

item.title: Tesla Extends China Sales Rebound
item.description: China-made EV sales rose 36% in April, marking a sixth straight monthly gain.

item.title: Tesla: Musk's Vision Is Finally Becoming Reality
Tesla Investor Ross Gerber Says Gas Prices 'Don't Matter' To Millions Of EV Owners: 'Go Get One'
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of the investment firm Gerber Kawasaki has urged drivers to opt for EVs in view of the Iran war that has led to surging gas prices across the U.S. Gas Prices Won’t Come Down In a post on X on Tuesday, Gerber outlined the benefits of EVs over gasoline-powered vehicles. “Gas pr...

item.title: Is It Too Late To Reassess Tesla (TSLA) After A 40% One Year Run?
item.description: Wondering whether Tesla's current US$398.73 share price offers good value, or whether expectations are running ahead of reality? This article breaks down what the numbers actually say. The stock has returned 4.5% over the last 7 days and 15.0% over the last 30 days, while the 1 year return sits a...

item.title: Tesla Semi hauls fresh Cybercab batch as Robotaxi era takes hold
item.description: A Tesla Semi loaded with Cybercab units was recently filmed leaving Gigafactory Texas, marking what appears to be the first documented delivery run of Tesla’s autonomous two-seater. The footage shows multiple Cybercabs secured on a flatbed trailer being hauled by a production Tesla Semi, a truck ...

item.title: Tesla rare mistake prompts it to recall thousands of U.S. vehicles
item.description: Tesla has built its brand on the idea that software is a strength, not a vulnerability. A recall confirmed May 6 is a reminder that the gap between those two things can close quickly. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) confirmed that 218,868 Tesla vehicles are being recall...

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck too safe for even Musk’s biggest critics to ignore
item.description: The Tesla Cybertruck is an extremely polarizing vehicle because of its potential symbolism as a political stance instead of just a pickup truck — or at least that is what many would want you to believe. Of course, the Cybertruck is an icon of Tesla culture, and it is one of those things that neve...

item.title: Tesla files new Roadster trademarks with unique badge ahead of launch
item.description: Tesla has filed two new trademark applications for the Roadster with the United States Patent and Trademark Office, revealing a stylized wordmark and a distinctive triangular badge that departs from the automaker’s standard branding approach. The filings are the clearest signal yet that Tesla is ...

item.title: Tesla Just Recalled Nearly 219,000 Cars. That’s Nothing Compared to Ford and Toyota.
item.description: FEATURE Tesla stock rose Wednesday despit ethe electric-vehicle maker recalling 218,868 cars to correct a rearview camera issue. That is the way Tesla stock should react to recall news. Tesla shares gained 2.

item.title: Tesla’s Robotics Push And Robotaxis Test Valuation Against Rising Safety Risks
item.description: Tesla has started large scale production of its Optimus humanoid robot, which CEO Elon Musk has described as potentially the company's biggest product. The company is expanding unsupervised robotaxi operations across Texas, building on its Full Self Driving (FSD) technology. European regulators a...

item.title: Tesla, Meta, Microsoft Investors May Need A 'Self-Destruct' Switch, Not Blind Faith
item.description: Investors piling into the AI trade may need something less glamorous than another price target, product demo or promise about the future: a rule for when to stop trusting their favorite market narrative. That is the central argument from the investing blog Capital Blueprint, helmed by an independ...

item.title: Nio Inc (NIO) Goes After Tesla’s Lunch Again
item.description: Nio Inc (NYSE:NIO) is one of the best large cap penny stocks under $10 to buy now. On April 28, Nio Inc (NYSE:NIO) launched its L80 model and immediately opened pre-orders for the car. The L80 is a two-row, 5-seat SUV that runs on battery power like all Nio cars.

item.title: SpaceXAI signs agreement with Anthropic for massive AI supercomputer access
item.description: SpaceXAI announced today that it had signed an agreement with Anthropic to give the company access to its Colossus 1 data center in Memphis, Tennessee. It is a monumental deal as Anthropic will gain access to all of the compute at the plan t, delivering more than 300 megawatts of power and over 2...

item.title: Insider Alert: Tesla Director Offloads Nearly $10 Million in Stock
item.description: Tesla Governance Activity in Focus After Director Offloads $10 Million Position

item.title: Musk’s AI empire is unraveling — the trial is just the beginning
item.description: On March 4, 2026, Elon Musk posted on X that “Tesla will be one of the companies to make AGI and probably the first to make it in humanoid/atom-shaping form.” Less than eight weeks later, under oath in an Oakland federal courtroom, he was asked whether Tesla has any concrete plans to pursue AGI. ...

item.title: SpaceX may spend up to $119 billion on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
item.description: SpaceX, Elon Musk's space company that also houses his AI company, xAI, is considering spending $55 billion, at least initially, to build a semiconductor factory in Texas, according to a filing with Grimes County.

item.title: Shivon Zilis, mother of Elon Musk’s children, testifies in lawsuit against OpenAI
item.description: Zilis, an executive at Musk’s brain implant startup Neuralink, served on OpenAI’s board from 2020 to 2023

item.title: Tesla unveils mysterious prototype at Giga Texas: Is the Model Y L coming to America?
item.description: Tesla unveiled a mysterious prototype, covered up between a Model Y and a Cybertruck at Gigafactory Texas, perhaps giving yet another hint that the Model Y L is coming to America. The Model Y L has been available in China for some time, but Americans are wondering when it will potentially come to...

item.title: Tesla-SpaceX File $55 Billion Estimate For Their Joint Semiconductor Factory
item.description: Elon Musk's Tesla and SpaceX estimated their Terafab AI chip factory will cost $55 billion, but said it could be much higher.

item.title: What Tesla's Massive $25B+ Capex Means for Investors Now
item.description: Tesla ramps capex beyond $25B to fuel AI, robotics, and autonomy bets, but rising risks, negative cash flow, and unclear timelines cloud near-term outlook.

item.title: Why Tesla's Optimus Story Is More Promise Than Progress
item.description: TSLA's Optimus vision faces delays, missed targets and unclear timelines, raising doubts about whether the humanoid robot can deliver on Musk's bold promises.

item.title: Jim Chanos Drops Reality Check On Cathie Wood's ARK Robotaxi Prediction: 'Isn't That 100%…'
item.description: Short seller James Chanos has questioned investor Cathie Wood-led investment firm ARK Invest‘s prediction that Robotaxis could become a $34 trillion market by 2030. A Bold Prediction Quoting a post by Ark Invest on the social media platform X on Monday, Chanos questioned Ark’s approach. The inves...

item.title: Tesla Roadster gets an update, but not the one fans were looking for
item.description: Tesla has been slow to show its hand regarding the massive project that is the Roadster, but it is now coming forth with a new update. However, it is probably not the one fans were looking for. Tesla has quietly filed a new trademark application for its next-generation Roadster , giving enthusias...

item.title: Tesla Has Recalled 219,000 Cars This Year. How That Compares to Ford and Toyota.
item.description: Tesla stock rose early Wednesday as the electric-vehicle maker recalled 218,868 cars to correct a rearview camera issue. Tesla shares were up 0.4% at $390.72, while the and were up 0.8% and 0.9%, respectively. Benchmark oil prices were down 8% at just over $101 per barrel in early trading.

item.title: Elon Musk Calls France Raising Retirement Age From 62 'Difficult But Right'— Says It's Impossible For Workers To Support 'Massive Retirees'
item.description: Retirement debates usually come packed with politics. Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk cut through one with a few lines of plain math.m In 2023, as protests spread across France over a proposal to raise the retirement age, Musk responded...

item.title: Musk, SpaceX to invest $55 billion for Terafab chip facility in Texas
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX plan a $55 billion investment to build a semiconductor manufacturing facility in Texas.
